code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut total = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut have = false
  mut done = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)

  while i < n
    if not done
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end

      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if have
          if total + current > 100
            done = true
          else
            total = total + current
          end
          current = 0
          have = false
        end
      else
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
        have = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if have
    if not done
      if total + current <= 100
        total = total + current
      end
    end
  end

  println("total=#{total}")
end
